Calimacil: Building Careers, Creating Community

Ready to join an extraordinary team crafting quality pieces in an unconventional industry? Your journey begins here!

At Calimacil, we're on the lookout for talented individuals to fulfill the unique demands of our customers. We're not your typical company – we're masters in the art of crafting foam swords for Live Action Role Play (LARP). Our production is an intricate dance of hands-on craftsmanship and skill. Join us in redefining the world of LARP weaponry!

Explore Career Opportunities

We believe in reimagining the way we present our job opportunities. Instead of specifying job titles, we describe tasks and skills we value. This allows us to attract diverse talent and discover hidden gems even when specific positions aren't open.

Mystical Artistry Mastery
